---
name: Framework Reference Request
about: Request security checks for a new framework
title: '[Framework] '
labels: enhancement, framework
assignees: ''
---

**Framework:**
e.g., Ruby on Rails, Laravel, Spring Boot

**Why this framework?**
Brief description of why this would be useful (e.g., "I'm building a Rails API with AI agents and the generic methodology misses Rails-specific issues like...")

**Known security patterns (optional):**
If you know framework-specific security concerns, list them here. This helps whoever writes the reference.
